PICKLEBALL STARS SHINE IN GLOBAL SUMMIT

By Billy Walters • 7/6/2024
pickleball-101

I'm thrilled about the 2024 Pickleball Summit, where Selkirk-sponsored stars will take center stage. Six top athletes and coaches, including Dylan Frazier and DJ Howard, will share their expertise. The new "Pulse of Pickleball" panel, featuring coach Audrey Banada, promises insider insights. What's even better? It's free and accessible online to anyone with internet. You'll learn pro strategies, advanced techniques, and mental game tips from international perspectives. CJ Johnson, a three-sport pro athlete, will offer advice for players over 50. This summit is set to elevate your pickleball game and connect you with a vibrant community. There's so much more to explore in this global pickleball extravaganza.

Key Takeaways

  • Six Selkirk-sponsored athletes and coaches will present at the 2024 Pickleball Summit, sharing unique insights and expertise.
  • The event features top players like Dylan Frazier and DJ Howard, who will discuss pro strategies and advanced techniques.
  • The Pulse of Pickleball panel, including coach Audrey Banada, offers direct access to expert opinions and fosters community engagement.
  • International perspectives are represented, with Judit Castillo offering insights from a global standpoint.
  • The summit is free to attend online, allowing pickleball enthusiasts worldwide to learn from and connect with industry leaders.

Selkirk Athletes Take Center Stage

Six standout Selkirk-sponsored athletes and coaches are set to share their expertise at the 2024 Pickleball Summit.

I'm thrilled to see Dylan Frazier, DJ Howard, Quang Duong, Judit Castillo, Linda Thompson, and Scott Tingley take center stage at this online event. Each presenter brings their unique perspective, offering invaluable coaching insights and sharing their personal pickleball journey.

I've had the pleasure of following these athletes' careers, and I can't wait to hear their stories firsthand.

If you're eager to learn more about their accomplishments, I recommend checking out their comprehensive biographies on selkirk.com. It's a fantastic opportunity to dive deep into their experiences and understand what's shaped their success.

This lineup of presenters promises to deliver a wealth of knowledge that'll inspire and elevate our pickleball community. Don't miss this chance to learn from the best!

Meet the Expert Presenters

Exceptional athletes and coaches form the expert panel at this year's Pickleball Summit, each bringing unique insights to the table. I'm thrilled to introduce you to our star-studded lineup:

Presenter Expertise
Dylan Frazier Pro Strategies
DJ Howard Advanced Techniques
Quang Duong Mental Game
Judit Castillo International Perspective

These experts will share their knowledge, helping us elevate our game. You'll find their full bios on our website, which uses cookies to enhance your experience. Don't forget to manage your cookie consent to access all website features.

I'm particularly excited about CJ Johnson's session. As a three-sport pro athlete and coach, he'll offer invaluable advice for players over 50. Together, we'll explore how to live our best lives on and off the courts. Let's join this community of passionate players and grow together!

The Pulse of Pickleball Debut

As we look beyond our expert presenters, I'm thrilled to announce an exciting addition to this year's Summit: The Pulse of Pickleball.

This lively pre-summit panel discussion will feature insights from top coaches and influencers, diving deep into pickleball's hottest topics. I'll be moderating alongside Tony, and we're excited to have Selkirk-sponsored coach Audrey Banada joining our inaugural panel.

The Pulse aims to give you direct access to expert opinions, fostering a sense of community among attendees.

It's all part of our commitment to making the Summit a hub for growth and learning. Just like how we've optimized our website's functionality and cookie management to enhance your experience, we're constantly improving the Summit to serve you better.

Don't miss this chance to be part of the conversation shaping pickleball's future!

Free Access for All

Thanks to Selkirk's support, we're offering the 2024 Pickleball Summit completely free to anyone with an internet connection. We're thrilled to bring you this hub for growth, learning, and community. Our goal is to celebrate the sport and help you elevate your game to new heights.

Here's what you can expect:

Feature Benefit
Free Access No cost barrier
Expert Speakers Learn from the best
Online Format Attend from anywhere
Community Focus Connect with others

To enhance your experience, we've optimized our website's cookies. These help improve user experience and provide relevant information. You can manage your cookie preferences, ensuring you're in control of your data while enjoying all the Summit has to offer.

Don't miss this opportunity to join our pickleball family. Get your free ticket now and let's grow together!

CJ Johnson's Coaching Legacy

CJ Johnson's journey as a professional three-sport athlete and coach has shaped his unique approach to pickleball instruction.

I've seen firsthand how his expertise extends beyond the court. CJ's commitment to seeing students' potential, not just their current abilities, sets him apart.

He's especially skilled at helping players over 50 thrive both on and off the courts.

CJ's coaching legacy includes:

  • Expertise in personal training and weight management
  • A focus on holistic player development
  • Innovative techniques for improving performance

As a coach, I've learned from CJ's approach to Cookie Management in training.

It's not just about restricting; it's about optimizing performance.

His background in Personal Training informs his pickleball instruction, creating well-rounded athletes.

CJ's methods have inspired me to view coaching as more than just skill development – it's about nurturing the whole player.

Summit Topics and Insights

The 2024 Pickleball Summit promises a wealth of knowledge from top-tier athletes and coaches, building on the expertise of industry leaders like CJ Johnson.

I'm thrilled to share that six exceptional Selkirk-sponsored presenters will offer their unique insights. From Dylan Frazier to Scott Tingley, each speaker brings a wealth of experience to the table.

I'm particularly excited about the new addition, 'The Pulse of Pickleball,' a pre-summit panel that'll dive into hot topics with coaches and influencers. It's a chance for us to hear directly from the experts.

As we gather for this free, online event, we're not just attending a conference – we're joining a community dedicated to growth and learning.

Don't forget to manage your cookie preferences for optimal website functionality.

Together, we'll elevate our game and celebrate our shared passion for pickleball.

Elevating Your Pickleball Game

While attending the 2024 Pickleball Summit, you'll gain invaluable insights to elevate your game from expert players and coaches.

I'm excited to share how this free online event will transform your pickleball journey.

You'll learn from Selkirk-sponsored athletes like Dylan Frazier and DJ Howard, who'll offer their unique perspectives on improving your skills.

  • Cutting-edge strategies from top players
  • Expert coaching tips for all skill levels
  • Insider knowledge on equipment and technique

Online Hub for Growth

Beyond improving your skills, the 2024 Pickleball Summit serves as a vibrant online hub for growth, learning, and community-building.

I'm excited to share that this free event is accessible to anyone with an internet connection, thanks to Selkirk's support. You'll join a global community of pickleball enthusiasts, ready to elevate their game.

To ensure you get the most out of this experience, I recommend optimizing your website functionality. Take a moment to manage your cookie preferences, allowing necessary and performance cookies for smooth navigation.

This will help you seamlessly connect with expert speakers and engage in the Pulse of Pickleball panel discussion.

Don't miss this opportunity to be part of something bigger.

Click the provided link to secure your free ticket and join us in celebrating our sport.

Together, we'll prepare to reach new heights in pickleball.

Celebrating the Sport's Community

At its core, the 2024 Pickleball Summit celebrates the vibrant community that's grown around this dynamic sport.

I'm thrilled to see how this event brings together players, coaches, and enthusiasts from all walks of life. It's not just about improving our game; it's about fostering connections and shared experiences.

The Summit's inclusive spirit is reflected in its accessibility:

  • Free attendance for anyone with internet access
  • Diverse lineup of speakers, including Selkirk-sponsored athletes
  • Interactive elements like 'The Pulse of Pickleball' panel

As we gather online, we're creating a digital community hub. Just like how website functionality and cookie management enhance our online experience, the Summit enhances our pickleball journey.

It's a place where we can learn, grow, and celebrate our shared passion. Together, we're elevating the sport and strengthening our bonds as a community.

Website Features and Privacy

Just as the Summit enhances our pickleball experience, the website's features and privacy measures ensure a smooth online journey for attendees.

Our site uses cookies to improve user experience and deliver relevant content. We've implemented a robust Cookie Management system, allowing you to control your privacy settings.

You'll find necessary cookies that keep our site running smoothly, functional cookies that enable social media sharing, and performance cookies that help us analyze and improve our services.

I encourage you to explore these options and customize your preferences. By prioritizing your privacy while optimizing functionality, we're creating a digital space where our pickleball community can thrive.

Together, we're not just attending a summit; we're shaping the future of our beloved sport in a secure, user-friendly online environment.

Conclusion

I'm buzzing with excitement for the 2024 Pickleball Summit.

Like a kid in a candy store, I can't wait to soak up knowledge from these Selkirk stars.

The free access and new 'Pulse of Pickleball' panel are game-changers.

I'll be front and center, learning from Dylan Frazier, Judit Castillo, and CJ Johnson.

This global gathering is more than just a summit—it's a launchpad for elevating our pickleball community and skills worldwide.

Written by Billy Walters
